name: caaals
title: Caaals Food Tracker
description: Log food with AI and browse your diary
author: chuck-38

commands.name: log-food
commands.title: Log Food
commands.subtitle: Caaals
commands.description: Log food to your diary using AI text analysis

commands.name: quick-log
commands.title: Quick Log
commands.subtitle: Caaals
commands.description: Re-log favorites and recent foods in one keystroke, no AI wait

commands.name: browse-diary
commands.title: Browse Diary
commands.subtitle: Caaals
commands.description: View and manage recent diary entries

commands.name: log-weight
commands.title: Log Weight
commands.subtitle: Caaals
commands.description: Record today's weight and see your trend

commands.name: today
commands.title: Today's Calories in Menu Bar
commands.subtitle: Caaals
commands.description: Adds a menu bar item with your remaining calories and macros. Running the command activates or refreshes it.

preferences.name: menuBarStyle
preferences.title: Menu Bar Display
preferences.description: How much text to show next to the icon. Smaller styles help on notched MacBooks with crowded menu bars.

preferences.name: apiUrl
preferences.title: API URL
preferences.description: The base URL of your Caaals API instance

preferences.name: apiToken
preferences.title: API Token
preferences.description: Personal API token generated from Settings in the Caaals app
